ksa_text: Test and validate analytical outputs and data pipelines, including creating testing procedures, developing automated test frameworks, performing quality assurance, and verifying that analytical results are accurate and reproducible.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of data classification standards and methodologies based on sensitivity and other risk factors.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of data classification standards and methodologies based on sensitivity and other risk factors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.423) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Science roles increasingly include Applied Analytics & BI competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Science now include Applied Analytics & BI competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Applied Analytics & BI task KSA is relevant to the VP Data Science based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
